---
title: "Stream Hydrology"
author: "Brianna Pierce"
date: "2026-05-19"
output: html_document
---

This repo contains the scripts necessary for running hydrology metrics on stream discharge and stage data.

## Calculated metrics include:  
- Richards-Baker Index (RBI)  
- TQmean  
- Flow reversals


## Data source
Data are pulled in via Herrera's DRIP API. Data are collected by Herrera and King County as part of Bellevue's Environmental Monitoring Program.

## Output
Data results are saved to the EMP Data Library on SharePoint.
